## [00:00 - 03:03]

Okay, so this is just the skeleton script for your sales video. Now I'm not going to go into great detail and read everything here because you can read it just as well as I can. It'll be a really boring video. Basically want to open with a big promise or a hook. You know, what if there was this thing that could completely change your life? Well, I've got it here. And then I like to go right to authority right in the very beginning. And if you really watch like what I do and the videos I put out, I'm sprinkling in authority nonstop all the way through because authority is what gets people to listen to you. And it makes a huge difference when you build that authority in. Then you want to show them what the opportunity is. You want to show them what the opportunity is. You again want to hit authority. And one of the things I want to mention about the skeleton script is a lot of these things, you can move them around or you can hit them more than once or revisit them more than once. Here is and then proof and testimonials really powerful to whatever level that you've got them super, super powerful. You want to foreshadow urgency somewhere fairly early on. You want to make your crushing offer. And you got to remember the offer and a bigger picture is the offer is the transformation. You're offering them a transformation. You're offering them to change their lives. And that's really what the offer is. And when you're making the offer that that's what you lead with. But then as you get further down in your sales video, then at some point you actually have to talk about what people are actually going to get because there are some people that are really interested in that and it makes a difference whether it's a live seminar that they travel to or it's an online course or whether it's a widget or it's a service or or it's a webinar or whatever. It makes a difference. And so you know the sort of the idea is in the bulk of your sales video, you're actually going to talk about the bigger picture, the transformation, the offer as relates to how their life is going to change. But then as you get further down, that's when you actually start talking about the stuff. Then you want to cover bonuses. And then you reveal your price. And down here, these things can they these can shift around a little bit. Like I like to reveal price. And then I often I'll go right to risk reversal, your guarantee. And then you know, then the call to action, which is telling them exactly what to do. You of course, you got to hit your urgency in here as well, your scarcity.

## [03:03 - 04:03]

And then, you know, if up here you hit your urgency, and then you have your call to action, then you may be given a surprise bonus, you do your risk reversal. You have now used up enough time where you can go back and you can re close. And this time you hit the scarcity pretty full on. Then you can have a PS with social proof. If you do that, you always do want to end with a call to action with another another close another call to action to get them to click the button. You always want to end with some of what we call the action. No matter what you do, whether you add a bonus at the end, where you talk about scarcity at the end, you revisit the the guarantee and the risk reversal, whatever. But then at the end, it's go ahead and click the button and join me. Go ahead and click the button and jump on board with, you know, everyone else has already bought.
